item.title: bernardflynn15: Bernard Flynn @bernardflynn15 · 5min Congratulations to @westmeath_gaa obviously the much better team massive win for
item.description:
Bernard Flynn @bernardflynn15 · 5min Congratulations to @westmeath_gaa obviously the much better team massive win for them & Mark Mc Hugh but a huge blow to @MeathGAA
Leinster championships are hard won so the one thing you can’t do is get ahead of yourself its back on the horse & go again. 1 98

item.title: SportTG4: Spórt TG4 @SportTG4 · 7min "Last year we were here and we played all the pretty football, but we didn't win the game"
